title: Support virtual interface parameterization
body:
I modified test `t_interface_virtual` to have a parameterized interface, and added the parameterization to the virtual interface type definition. The default for the parameter is not the same as the value used in the current code, this is meant to further check whether the parameter was properly propagated. Something else worth checking would be whether parameters match during assignment operations on virtual interfaces (this is buggy in Vivado 2023.1 simulator I am mostly using for reference), as described in an example toward the end of section "25.9 Virtual interfaces" of IEEE Std 1800-2017.
```diff
$ git diff test_regress/t/t_interface_virtual.v
diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_interface_virtual.v b/test_regress/t/t_interface_virtual.v
index 878df0995..0c52222c1 100644
--- a/test_regress/t/t_interface_virtual.v
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_interface_virtual.v
@@ -6,13 +6,13 @@
 
 // See also t_interface_virtual_bad.v
 
-interface PBus;
+interface PBus #(int unsigned W = 1);
    logic req, grant;
-   logic [7:0] addr, data;
+   logic [W-1:0] addr, data;
    modport phy(input addr, ref data);
 endinterface
 
-typedef virtual PBus vpbus_t;
+typedef virtual PBus #(8) vpbus_t;
 typedef vpbus_t vpbus2_t;
 
 class Cls;
```

This is the resulting error:
```sh
$ ./test_regress/t/t_interface_virtual.pl 
==SUMMARY: Left 2  Passed 0  Failed 0  Time 0:00
======================================================================

-Skip: dist/t_interface_virtual: scenario 'dist' not enabled for test
dist/t_interface_virtual: -Skip: Skip: scenario 'dist' not enabled for test
==SUMMARY: Left 1  Passed 0  Failed 0  Time 0:00
======================================================================
vlt/t_interface_virtual: ==================================================
	perl /home/izi/VLSI/verilator-upstream/test_regress/../bin/verilator --prefix Vt_interface_virtual ../obj_vlt/t_interface_virtual/Vt_interface_virtual__main.cpp --exe --make gmake --x-assign unique -cc -Mdir obj_vlt/t_interface_virtual --fdedup --debug-check --comp-limit-members 10 --clk clk  -f input.vc +define+TEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_interface_virtual +define+TEST_DUMPFILE=obj_vlt/t_interface_virtual/simx.vcd t/t_interface_virtual.v    > obj_vlt/t_interface_virtual/vlt_compile.log
%Error: Internal Error: t/t_interface_virtual.v:15:24: ../V3LinkDot.cpp:2322: Pin not under instance?
   15 | typedef virtual PBus #(8) vpbus_t;
      |                        ^
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
%Warning: vlt/t_interface_virtual: Exec of perl failed: %Error: Internal Error: t/t_interface_virtual.v:15:24: ../V3LinkDot.cpp:2322: Pin not under instance?

vlt/t_interface_virtual: %Error: Exec of perl failed: %Error: Internal Error: t/t_interface_virtual.v:15:24: ../V3LinkDot.cpp:2322: Pin not under instance?
vlt/t_interface_virtual: FAILED: Exec of perl failed: %Error: Internal Error: t/t_interface_virtual.v:15:24: ../V3LinkDot.cpp:2322: Pin not under instance?
==SUMMARY: Passed 0  Failed 1  Time 0:00

======================================================================
	#vlt/t_interface_virtual: %Error: Exec of perl failed: %Error: Internal Error: t/t_interface_virtual.v:15:24: ../V3LinkDot.cpp:2322: Pin not under instance?
		make && test_regress/t/t_interface_virtual.pl  --vlt
TESTS DONE, FAILED: Passed 0  Failed 1  Time 0:00
```
